occupation: Cofounder & CEO at Enmedio Comunicación Digital
headline: Entrepreneur, Cofounder & CEO at Enmedio Comunicacion Digital
summary:
In 2005 as I was studying Business in Eafit, in my home town Medellin, I quickly realized that I wanted to take the entrepreneurial path and that what I wanted was to start a company. As soon as I finished the University I went to live in Shanghai for 7 months where I studied basic practical spoken Chinese and searched for business opportunities that I could take back to my country. In February of 2006 I came back to Colombia and co founded Enmedio Comunicacion Digital, the first Digital Signage company in our country. 

Digital Signage is a relatively new media and communications platform that uses LCD/LED digital displays that are strategically installed in public or private venues, and that are remotely managed through the internet to deliver real time targeted content such as promotion, advertising, corporate or general information, to different types of audiences. 

Today we are the largest Digital Signage Company in Colombia and one of the largest in Latin America, operating more than 10.500 screens in 6 countries for + 600 clients and an incredible team of more than 165 people. We work with companies that are tired of printing and physically distributing their traditional printed communications to their locations, by replacing those posters, billboards, bulletin boards and others, with multi format digital displays that can play real time targeted content to different audiences. We  are full systems integrator offering Digital Signage as a service: Installation, hardware, content management system, content programming, content production, advertising sales and measurement among others. We believe in helping our clients to deliver the right message, at the right time and place, to the right people.  

As an entrepreneur for more than 18 years, I have been very active in the entrepreneurial ecosystem in Colombia helping wherever I can as a speaker, mentor and angel investor.  I was part of the founding team of Andi del Futuro and I am an Endeavor Entrepreneur since 2014.

experiences.title: Cofounder & CEO
experiences.description:
Founded in 2006, Enmedio was the first Digital Signage Company to launch in Colombia and today it leads this new industry operating more than 11.000 digital displays in +100 municipalities and 6 countries. 
Digital Signage is a media and communications platform based in digital displays that are strategically installed in private and public venues, and that are remotely managed through the internet, delivering real time targeted content such as advertising, news, general information, and entertainment amongst others.

As leaders in Digital Signage in our region, we offer a wide variety of products and services: 

Enmedio Corporate - Digital Signage Services for companies: 
- Industries we work with: Retail, Corporate Communications, Quick Service Restaurants, Banks, Automotive Dealers, Healthcare, Education, Transportation, Entertainment & Hospitality. 
- Services & Solutions: Hardware sales and rental, installations, content management systems, remote network programing & management, maintenance, content production, interactivity, audience metrics & analytics.
- Products: Corporate TV, Instore TV, Interactive Apps, Touch Screens & Kiosks, Digital Menu Boards, Queue Management Systems, Outdoor Digital Displays, Wayfinding, Control Centers, Streaming, Iot and VR/MR. 

Enmedio DOOH Advertising - Digital Out of Home Media 
- We operate and commercialize 6 DOOH Advertising Networks in Colombia: Shopping Centers, Supermarkets, Office Buildings, Hospitals, Fitness Clubs and a network of big LED screens where we have the largest one in Latin America with 500m2.

Enmedio Connect:
- Mobile App for corporate communications available on IOS and Android.
 
Enmedio Direct:
- Programmatic advertising platform for DOOH media.

recommendations:
Sebastian Franco

Desde el momento en que conocí a Sebastián, supe que estaba destinado a lograr grandes cosas. Su trayectoria desde emprendedor hasta convertirse en un referente en su campo ha sido nada menos que inspiradora. Lo que más admiro de Sebastián es su combinación de profesionalismo, integridad, honor y seriedad, todo ello respaldado por una perseverancia incansable que lo distingue en todos sus empeños.

Sebastián posee una capacidad de empatía extraordinaria, lo que le permite no solo innovar y adaptarse con agilidad a los cambios, sino también conectar de manera genuina con las personas a su alrededor. Su pasión por contribuir a la comunidad es evidente en su participación activa en gremios y en la creación de redes de apoyo, demostrando un compromiso real con el desarrollo colectivo.

La energía y las ganas insaciables de Sebastián por aportar valor son contagiosas. Es alguien que no solo busca el éxito personal, sino que se esfuerza por elevar a quienes lo rodean, haciendo de él no solo un líder excepcional, sino también una fuente de inspiración para todos los que tenemos la suerte de conocerlo.

Mateo CARMONA-ARANGO

I have had the pleasure of knowing Sebastian for many years. Sebastian, along with two friends, co-founded Enmedio over 15 years ago, and their company has now expanded to several countries in Latin America. I had the opportunity to meet Sebastian through our involvement in the ANDI del Futuro, where we both played a significant role in establishing the most influential entrepreneurs' guild in Colombia, which has now become a chamber within the association. Together with Sebastian, we formed the board of directors in Bogota.

Sebastian is a visionary, compassionate, and down-to-earth individual. He possesses exceptional leadership qualities and is dedicated to achieving results while caring for his employees. I highly recommend Sebastian both as a person and as a professional. He is undoubtedly someone whose point of view is always worth listening to, and he is always willing to lend a helping hand.

///

He tenido el placer de conocer a Sebastian durante muchos años. Sebastian, junto con dos amigos, fundó Enmedio hace más de 17 años, y su compañía ha expandido su presencia a varios países de Latinoamérica. Tuve la oportunidad de conocer a Sebastian a través de nuestra participación en ANDI del Futuro, donde ambos desempeñamos un papel importante en el establecimiento del gremio de emprendedores más importante de Colombia, el cual ahora es una cámara dentro de la asociación nacional de empresarios ANDI. Juntos, establecimos la junta directiva en Bogotá.

Sebastian es una persona visionaria, humana y sencilla. Posee cualidades de liderazgo excepcionales y está dedicado a lograr resultados al tiempo que se ocupa de su equipo. Recomiendo ampliamente a Sebastian tanto como persona como profesional. Sin duda, es alguien cuyo punto de vista siempre vale la pena escuchar y siempre está dispuesto a tender una mano.

Camilo Arango

Sebastian has been a great mentor for Vueltap. He is definitely someone any CEO should have by his side. He is completely strategy focused and has great inputs on how to scale a company. We are very thankful for all his support!!

Catalina Ospina Rubiano

Trabajar con Sebastián y el equipo de Enmedio fue una gran experiencia. No solo por el conocimiento y habilidades en su campo, sino por la calidez tanto de Sebastián como de las personas que contrata y forma en su empresa. Siempre será un gusto el contacto comercial con Enmedio!
